g.text: Plains, farmland or grassland, up to builder. More farmlands closer to cities
Nothing - disconnected room (usually overwritten by city zones)
Normal zone inserted here - usually a city or MM2 zone
Towns surrounding Tar Valon. 46958 is Alindaer. Others unbuilt.
Large hills - vegetation up to builder.
Light trees or light forest, depending on surrounding zones. If against a dense forest, make a lighter forest.
Note that Caemlyn and Aringill use a slightly different color scheme for terrain. They're almost done anyway - work on the other zones
